title: Built in Hyderabad.
description: A purpose-built campus in Madhapur — at the heart of India's most dynamic tech corridor.
officeBlurb: Our Hyderabad campus brings People, Technology, and Process under one roof — engineering, data, AI, operations, finance tech, and member-experience teams collaborating with Costco business and product partners worldwide.

features.title: Award-aligned
features.body: Targeting Great Place to Work culture.

features.title: Connected
features.body: Close to Hitech City metro & expressways.

items.label: Modern campus
items.body: Purpose-built workspaces in Madhapur — Hyderabad's tech corridor.

items.label: Collaboration zones
items.body: Open team areas, focus rooms, and war-rooms for the work that demands it.

items.label: Meeting & video rooms
items.body: Connected rooms designed for partner overlap with HQ in Issaquah.

items.label: Wellness & cafeteria
items.body: Cafeteria with daily menus and wellness amenities for the team.

items.label: Green-aligned design
items.body: Energy-efficient floors and reduced single-use plastics across the campus.

items.label: Connected location
items.body: Close to the Hitech City metro, expressways, and the broader Madhapur ecosystem.
